title: Promptetheus – Trace, detect, and auto-repair AI agent failures
abstract: Promptetheus – Trace, detect, and auto-repair AI agent failures is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it handles ...
abstract_zh: Promptetheus来了，就像你的私人故障修复小能手！设置个目标，剩下的交给它。不管AI agent跑偏到哪儿，都能自动追踪、检测，还能自己动手修好，让你省心又省力。说它是你工作中的“故障克星”，还真是一点不夸张！
